race.comment: TOY STORY (5) finished seventh two runs back then improved last start but found a couple better over 1000m at Charleville, beaten 2.75 lengths. Goes up a rung or two but he is worth serious consideration. CROWN REACH (1) finished a 6 length eighth first up two runs back on a dirt track at Longreach over 1200m. Followed that up with an unplaced effort on turf at Mackay over 1100m. Strips fitter now and is worth including back to this surface. WINDORAH (9) finished 3.5 lengths away in sixth last time out over 1000m at Barcaldine two weeks ago. Tackles a longer journey this time. Should park just off the speed and rates a leading contender. FOR THE BRAVE (10) hasn't made an impression lately despite market confidence. Last start could only manage fifth over 1000m at Charleville. Where there's smoke there's fire and looks one for the exotics players.
